title: Function Types, Parameters, Overloads, and Callable APIs · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Refactor status calculations and adapters into callable contracts that preserve inputs, failures, and return relationships. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a callable service transformation toolkit after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model parameter, return, callback, this, and side-effect expectations with readable function types.
Reason about callback parameter compatibility under strictFunctionTypes without accepting unsound narrower handlers.
Model optional, default, rest, tuple-rest, and destructured parameters without ambiguous call shapes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Function Type Contracts · changed case
steps.instruction:
review case — A lookup accepts keys "id" and "status" from records numbered 6–8. Preserve the relationship between the selected key and return type, then reject a callback that handles a narrower record than callers may supply.
